problem: Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear
hypothesis: Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Thermoelectric. Thermoelectric Seebeck coefficient maximization directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
